payload.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Project Victor autonomy dependency impact into Builder surfaces" in phase "Forecast and Planning Operations"?
groundedNodeLabels: Project Victor autonomy dependency impact into Builder surfaces
Model Victor as a separate governed project inside Builder and define the forecasting signals for remaining autonomy work.
Turn the new Victor and Builder planning artifacts into Builder-managed operational work so unattended execution has a governed next queue.
Model Victor project lifecycle from concept to completion
Extend Victor from supervised phase-by-phase execution into sustainable governed heartbeat operation with explicit separation between project build progress and non-project self-reflection.
Victor forecast inputs are evidence-backed and separate from generic automation activity.
Queue next governed slices across Victor and Builder
Phase 1: Victor Lifecycle and Forecast Foundation
recommendedNextActions: Implement builder surfaces reflect Victor dependency impact only where it materially affects delivery
